svg.text: BookStore Platform — Complete AWS EKS Architecture
Browser to Database — Every Component, Every Connection, Every Security Boundary
Workers Security Group • IN: 30000-32767 from ALB-SG | IN: ALL from self | OUT: ALL to VPC endpoints + DB-SG + MSK-SG
Istio Ambient Mesh — mTLS STRICT between ALL pods • ztunnel L4 + waypoint L7
Browser → ALB → Istio Gateway → UI Pod (React SPA served by Nginx)
UI → Keycloak (OIDC Authorization Code + PKCE login → JWT access token + refresh token in HTTP-only cookie)
UI → csrf-service via Istio ext_authz (GET /csrf/token → CSRF token stored in React state)
UI → ecom-service (GET /ecom/books — public, no authentication required)
UI → ecom-service (POST /ecom/cart — JWT in Authorization header + X-CSRF-Token header)
UI → ecom-service (POST /ecom/checkout — JWT + CSRF + Idempotency-Key header)
ecom-service → inventory-service (POST /inven/reserve — internal mTLS, admin role required)
ecom-service → MSK Kafka (publish order.created event to Kafka topic)
inventory-service → MSK Kafka (publish inventory.updated event after stock deduction)
MSK Kafka → Flink SQL (4 streaming jobs: fact_orders, fact_order_items, dim_books, dim_stock) → analytics-db
analytics-db → Superset (3 dashboards: Product Sales Volume, Sales Over Time, Stock Levels • 16 charts)
Database Subnet NACL • IN: 5432 from Workers only • OUT: ephemeral to Workers
IN: 5432/tcp from Workers-SG ONLY • OUT: NONE (no egress needed)
← Each Aurora cluster has writer + reader across AZs
VPC ENDPOINTS (PRIVATE CONNECTIVITY — NO INTERNET REQUIRED)
VPC Endpoints Security Group • IN: 443/tcp from Workers-SG • OUT: NONE
EKS: $73 • Nodes: ~$91 (Spot) • Aurora: ~$172 (4 clusters) • MSK: ~$150 (3 brokers) • NAT: ~$45 • VPC Endpoints: ~$37 • Redis: ~$40 • ALB: ~$20 • Other: ~$12
Every arrow is authenticated, every connection encrypted, every resource in private subnets.
BookStore Platform • AWS EKS Architecture • Complete End-to-End Flow
